command.newFile.title: Create New File
command.newFileAtRoot.title: Create New File at Path
config.templates.description: Map simple glob patterns to initial file content. Use ${name} for the file stem (basename without extension). Patterns without `/` match the basename only; patterns with `/` match the workspace-relative path. First matching pattern wins. Supports `*` (within one path segment) and `**` (across segments).
config.openAfterCreate.description: Which files to open in the editor after creation.
